prompt: Create a 3-slide IBM Carbon deck about cloud migration strategy. Slide 1 should be a title slide, slide 2 should have 3 pillar cards (Assess, Migrate, Optimize) with gradient top accent bars and icons, and slide 3 should be a closing slide. Use Carbon design tokens throughout. Output as migration-strategy.pptx.

assertions.text: Output file migration-strategy.pptx exists and is valid
Uses shadow factory pattern (not shared shadow objects)
No # prefix on pptxgenjs color values
Uses renderGradientBar for accent bars with h >= 0.08
slide.background set to white on content slides
